name: Signal Gate Hazard Drone
description: A deterministic gate-guard hazard archetype for the Collect-and-Exit demo. The drone is dormant until the signal key is collected; collecting the key arms it, and contact with an armed drone ends the run (player_alive -> false). It reuses the existing runtime trigger contract (sensor collider + requiredFlags + onEnter clearFlag); it adds no engine surface and no executable behavior code.

states.description: Inactive until the signal key is collected; contact is harmless.
Activated once key_collected is true; contact ends the run (player_alive -> false).

scenarios.description: The drone sits past the key; collecting the key arms it and contact ends the run before the exit.
The drone sits before the key; the player passes it while dormant, collects the key, and exits alive.

boundary: Deterministic source-like behavior archetype only; reuses the existing runtime trigger contract. No engine surface, no executable plugin/behavior code, no committed generated output, no trusted browser write, no production/native/store export, and no full Godot parity or replacement claim.
